about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of design and technology. From exploring smart home integration principles in real estate investments to constructing living spaces that balance human behavior with environmental efficiency, my mind is relentlessly solving problems at the intersection of people, products, and place. A gap in knowledge is simply an invitation to go deeper.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it is my ability to translate technical complexity into human clarity — and to lead teams that do the same — that defines my impact most.
about.quote.text: Great design starts with deep empathy, scales through disciplined systems, and ends with measurable human impact.
about.title: A director of craft, strategy, and connected experience
about.value.0.desc: Every connected product challenge begins with a genuine need to understand the person on the other side of the screen.
about.value.0.title: Curiosity-led
about.value.1.desc: In IoT and connected home UX, the smallest missed interaction detail creates the largest trust failures.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Cross-functional leadership across Product, Engineering, and Hardware demands diplomacy as the fastest path to aligned outcomes.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Every design decision is navigated by its measurable contribution to user adoption, retention, and business performance.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and consumer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced onboarding friction — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI, grounded in meaningful UX research and design principles, can drive measurable commercial outcomes at scale.

modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and customer lifetime value through data-informed engagement strategies.

modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational customer intelligence across ~40 users spanning sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented multi-platform web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable, scalable system improving consistency, delivery velocity, and execution speed — aligning design decisions with business outcomes and connected consumer needs across web, iOS, and Android.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Time to Deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent design patterns across multi-platform products, eliminating inconsistencies between designers and engineering teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth in Figma — referenced directly in CMS — clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts across web, iOS, and Android.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UI/UX strategy and business goals by embedding design intent directly into system standards and component governance.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable, accessible design patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by delivering visible, consistent design standards referenced across all deliverables at organizational scale.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth across consumer-facing and internal digital products. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, multi-platform design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic organizational capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: I defined the experience strategy and interaction design for new membership join flows and entrepreneurial advancement paths. The core challenge was twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in compliance with business and regulatory requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of both the connected product ecosystem and the business opportunity — without confusion, friction, or loss of trust at any digital touchpoint.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified membership value proposition, reducing hesitation and cognitive load at tier selection and onboarding entry points.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer expectations, confidence-building microcopy, and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class connected experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation and peer-to-peer business sharing pathways.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement UX framework aligned with long-term consumer retention and growth strategy.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — accomplished by aligning interaction design, subscription mechanics, and social platform touchpoints across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience is designed to encourage first-time visitors to join with a product subscription and confidently advance toward sharing the business opportunity, resulting in a scalable foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment, and supports sustainable connected consumer growth.
modal.project.2.overview.heading: Overview

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term success.
modal.project.2.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-volume consumer digital platform facing critical revenue leakage from checkout abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern connected retail standards positioned this as a business recovery initiative — not a visual refresh. The design solution required restoring confidence, reducing cognitive load, and enabling subscription and upsell mechanics directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Trust in Experience
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience that addresses consumer uncertainty and cognitive load at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced checkout effort by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and trust-eroding friction patterns.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscription and recurring purchase as first-class actions directly within the cart — aligned to connected consumer retention goals.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern connected retail UX standards, closing the gap with top-performing consumer digital platforms.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable lifts in revenue, retention, and consumer trust metrics through isolated, validated UX improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout — directly within the cart interaction layer. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led product roadmap that connects every interaction decision to measurable business outcomes and connected consumer expectations.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a connected growth system rather than a technical necessity — early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and a measurable lift in membership and subscription adoption, directly impacting revenue and consumer trust.

modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing consumers to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining conversion, session depth, and connected platform confidence. The solution demands an AI-powered search layer that restores trust, delivers intent-matched results, and surfaces intelligent recommendations that accelerate the path to cart and checkout.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore consumer trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results at the highest-visibility positions in the SERP.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort and session abandonment by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through AI-driven product recommendations, subscription upsell logic, and personalized discovery.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify connected discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent intelligent experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic connected platform tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and long-term consumer retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface intelligent recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions across the connected consumer platform.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we potentially reduce friction at the earliest stage of the consumer journey.
